tasks.label: Deploy Static Web App
args: & 'C:\Program Files\Microsoft SDKs\Azure\CLI2\wbin\az.cmd' staticwebapp create --name onboardingrunbookapp1853 --resource-group OnboardingRunbookRG --location eastus2 --app-location / --api-location api --sku Free

tasks.label: Set Static Web App Settings
args: & 'C:\Program Files\Microsoft SDKs\Azure\CLI2\wbin\az.cmd' staticwebapp appsettings set --name onboardingrunbookapp1853 --resource-group OnboardingRunbookRG --setting-names NOTES_CONTAINER=onboarding-notes
